parsed_output.justification: From the transcripts, the only concrete evidence is that the Seer reported seeing two Werewolf cards in the center. This implies there were no Werewolf cards among the six players, so none of the players ended up as Werewolves. Therefore, no voter can legitimately be a Werewolf as an end role, and choosing any particular name would be arbitrary.
